Updates

Latest News

🎬 Movie Update

Warner Bros. picks up KOTLC

Warner Bros. Pictures has acquired the rights to bring Keeper of the Lost Cities to the big screen. The legendary studio behind Harry Potter is now shepherding the beloved elf-world saga toward a cinematic adaptation — the Lost Cities are coming to life.

📖 Final Book Title Revealed
Elysian
BOOK 12 · THE FINAL CHAPTER

The saga ends with Elysian

Shannon Messenger has confirmed the title of the twelfth and final book in the KOTLC series: Elysian. After more than a decade of adventure, mystery, and heartbreak in the Lost Cities, the last chapter is on the horizon. No release date has been confirmed yet.

📚 Out Now

Unravelled is here!

Book 11, Unravelled, is out now! This Keefe-focused novel follows his perspective after the events of Stellarlune, delivering emotional depth, Team Foster-Keefe moments, and revelations that will reshape everything you thought you knew about the Lost Cities.

Spotlight

Featured Character

✦ Featured ✦
Keefe Sencen
✦ Empath · Lord Hunkyhair ✦

Once the charming, prank-loving son of a Councillor, Keefe Sencen has grown into one of the most complex and beloved characters in the series. His Empath ability — the power to sense and influence the emotions of others — has both defined and tormented him. Beneath every joke and every perfectly-timed smirk is someone carrying the weight of his mother's betrayal, his connection to the Neverseen's plans, and his undeniable, ever-deepening bond with Sophie Foster. In Unravelled, Keefe steps into the spotlight as a protagonist in his own right — and the Lost Cities will never be the same.

11Books Featured

🎯
Throw Dex's Gadgets

Angry-Birds style mayhem. Drag back, aim, and launch Dex's inventions at Neverseen machines before they overrun the cities. Unlock the Smoke Bomb, Flash Crystal, Force Bubble, and Stink Bomb as you go.

Drag from the slingshot to aim. Release to launch!
Sacred Grove

The Panakes Tree

The Panakes tree blooms with healing blossoms that can cure even the most dire elvin ailments. Found at Havenfield under the care of the Foster family, its pink flowers have saved lives — and carry the quiet magic of hope. Sit beneath its branches and let the petals fall.
